race.comment: SALOON PASSAGE (13) chipped away late at her second run back with an even fifth over 1250m at Canterbury. Will appreciate a drop in grade with the in-form stable apprentice aboard. Respect. VIVA MAURICIO (5) Maurice gelding who resumes after finishing in the minor money in town last preparation. Back with the two trials and can play a leading role. OVERSHADOW (12) lightly raced filly resuming. Failed to close off in a very strong Super Maiden when seventh to Providence at Wyong over 1350m last February. Back with the one trial placing and worth thought. CHE OLE (8) returns from a let-up after she closed off well to secure third over 1400m at Parkes in a Super Maiden. Placed here three-back over this trip and worth thought.
